title: Once Dimension Record
description: Schema for a single sub-dimension record in a Once compatibility profile

pos.description: Position on the dimension-specific spectrum. Plain language e.g. centre-left, secure, ambivert

tier.description: Tier letter A-E on the dimension-specific spectrum

bsig.description: Behavioural signal codes from S_signals.md that support this dimension

trg.description: Trigger codes from T_triggers.md relevant to this dimension

exp.description: Expression codes from X_expressions.md relevant to this dimension

src.description: Source conversation references that surfaced this signal

upd.description: Last updated date in YYYYMMDD format

oq.description: Open questions — what the AI still needs to learn to improve this dimension
